title: onagra chrysantha var. cruciata
intro: Onagra chrysantha var. cruciata, also known as Desert Evening Primrose, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Onagra chrysantha var. cruciata include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
